meaning: n.爱荷华州(美国中西部的一州)
examples: He was governor of Iowa in the late 1970s.
In 1932, he established a school and artists' colony in Stone City, Iowa.
In a recent speech in Iowa, he dismissed wind power as an unreliable energy source.
And these two states will be the second and third states after Iowa and New Hampshire.
On Tuesday, the President will travel to Oskaloosa, Marshalltown, and Waterloo, Iowa for campaign events.
